title: Bridge Essay: Aggressiveness, violence, homicidality, homicide, and Lyme disease.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Aggressiveness, violence, homicidality, homicide, and Lyme disease.** — Neuropsychiatr Dis Treat. PMID: 29576731. DOI: 10.2147/NDT.S155143. No study has previously analyzed aggressiveness, homicide, and Lyme disease (LD). Retrospective LD chart reviews analyzed aggressiveness, compared 50 homicidal with 50 non-homicidal patients, and analyzed homicides. Most aggression with LD was impulsive, sometimes provoked by intrusive symptoms, sensory stimulation or frustration and was invariably bizarre and senseless.
